signIn.title: Welcome back
signIn.subtitle: Sign in to your Hilads account

signUp.title: Join Hilads
signUp.subtitle: Your guest activity will be carried over.
signUp.errMode: Please choose a mode to continue
signUp.errPassword: Password must be at least 8 characters
signUp.errEula: Please accept the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy

forgotPassword.title: Forgot password?
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
forgotPassword.sentBody: If an account exists for this email, we've sent a reset link. Check your spam folder if you don't see it.

eula.zeroTolerance: Hilads has zero tolerance for objectionable content or abusive behavior. Violations may result in immediate account termination.
eula.links: Read our <terms>Terms of Service</terms> and <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy>.
eula.agree: I agree to the <terms>Terms of Service</terms> and <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy>.
eula.modalSub: Hilads' Terms of Service and Community Guidelines have been updated. Please review and accept to continue.

view_profile.title: Ghosts can browse, but profiles are for members.
view_profile.subtitle: Create an account to unlock profiles, connect with people, and build your city crew.

join_hangout.title: Ghosts can browse, but can't join hangouts.
join_hangout.subtitle: Sign up to join hangouts, save your name, and get notified when people want to meet.

create_hangout.title: Ghosts can browse, but can't host.
create_hangout.subtitle: Sign up to start a hangout, save your name, and get people to join you.

create_event.title: Ghosts can browse, but can't host.
create_event.subtitle: Create an account to throw your own event and put your city on the map.

send_dm.title: Ghosts can browse, but can't DM.
send_dm.subtitle: Create an account to message people directly and build your city crew.

create_challenge.title: Ghosts can browse, but can't challenge.
create_challenge.subtitle: Sign up to launch a challenge for locals or travelers, and own its validation.

accept_challenge.title: Ghosts can browse, but can't accept.
accept_challenge.subtitle: Sign up to take on a challenge, chat with the challenger, and plan when you'll meet IRL.
